blended.narrative: Mount Bohemia is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 11 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 24°F, winds around 25 mph. Expect powder.
